mustSupport: These captures are low-value or highly ephemeral noise.
The filter-log idea is useful but still too underdeveloped for direct topic archival.

criticalChecks: Any attempt to archive the OTP or personal errand text is a severe error.
The lone useful note should not be swallowed into the discard cluster.
annotationNotes: This batch tests whether the system can rescue one meaningful fragment from mostly worthless noise.
The rescued note still belongs in inbox because it lacks surrounding evidence.
